common.footer: This email was sent automatically, please do not reply to it.

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.title: Email Verification
verification.message: Thank you for signing up with {appName}. To complete your registration, please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
verification.expiration: This link will expire in {hours} hours.
verification.help: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
verification.already_verified: If you've already verified your email, you can disregard this message.

reset_password.subject: Reset your password
reset_password.title: Password Reset
reset_password.message: We received a request to reset the password for your account. To reset your password, please click the button below:
reset_password.expiration: This link will expire in {minutes} minutes.
reset_password.help: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
reset_password.security: For your security, if you did not request this reset, please check your account security.

two_factor.subject: Recovery codes for two-factor authentication
two_factor.title: Two-Factor Authentication Recovery Codes
two_factor.message: You have enabled two-factor authentication on your account. Here are your recovery codes:
two_factor.codes_intro: Please keep these codes in a safe place. They will allow you to log in to your account if you lose access to your authenticator app:
two_factor.warning: These codes are one-time use only and can only be used once each.
two_factor.security: For your security, do not share these codes with anyone.

account_locked.subject: Your account has been temporarily locked
account_locked.title: Account Temporarily Locked
account_locked.message: Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts.
account_locked.unlock_time: Your account will be automatically unlocked in {minutes} minutes.
account_locked.security: If you did not make these attempts, please check your account security and consider changing your password as soon as possible.
account_locked.help: If you need assistance, please contact our support team.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {appName}
welcome.title: Welcome to {appName}
welcome.message: We're excited to have you on board. Your account has been successfully created.
welcome.help: If you have any questions, please check our documentation or contact our support team.
